creator: james@french.id.au
text:
Created attachment 216487
Patch on r488341

Now that Kodi 18.7.1 has been committed, this add-on needs a version bump to build. Attached patch fixes a build issue (include paths) and a source issue (need to include time.h in Entity.h.

Bug 248013 has been raised against devel/kodi-platform to address cmake paths in that package.
